title: Recurring Discounts
excerpt: Hey everyone! Currently its only possible to have a recurring indefinite discount for apps, or a discount for 1 month, or a discount for 1 year. It would be great to be able to cancel the indefinite recurring discount, o…

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey everyone! Currently its only possible to have a recurring indefinite discount for apps, or a discount for 1 month, or a discount for 1 year. It would be great to be able to cancel the indefinite recurring discount, or to be able to choose how many months you would like your discount to apply for. At the moment, we can’t give 2 or 3 months free for example as a holiday special. It really limits the offers we can provide, and certain apps monetization (like our own) are based off of monthly action usage, so a short trial limits the users ability to properly assess the app on their account.
